Off Calendar Nov-21-2003 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Consolidated with Case No. 305685 Peter Yorke vs. Green Int'l. Inc. Appearance for plaintiff. The OSC is re-set to 2/10/2004 at 10:00 AM; in Department 212. Proceedings reported by: Gena Eales, CSR 176. (212)

***Amended Notice*** Notice Of Motion To Enforce Settlement Agreement Pursuant To Ccp 664.6, 664.7 & For Interest. Costs, And Fees Pursuant To Ccp 128.5 & Other Applicable Rules
Off Calendar Sep-19-2003 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Daniel L. Rottinghaus, Esq. and Jan Kopczynski, Esq. of BERDING & WEIL 925/838-2090, for plaintiff Sutterfield Homeowners Association 782-2680, moving to enforce settlement agreement
W. Bryce Chastain, Esq. of LAMORE, BRAZIER 408/280-6800, for defendants Richard A. Levine, Esq. of LAW OFFICES OF JEFFREY F. PACCASSI 932-7236, for defendant and opposing party The Lawson Roofing Co., Inc.
Shahab E. Fotouhi, Esq. of PHILLIPS SPALLAS & FOTOUHI 278-9400, for defendants Green International, Inc. and Green Holdings Inc., opposing to plaintiff Sutterfield's motion

RULING:
* The Court also heard argument in #305685 in this hearing.
** A R G U E D and the Court adopted its tentative ruling -- PLAINTIFF SUTTERFIELD HOMEOWNERS ASSOCIATION's Motion To Enforce Settlement Agreement Pursuant To Ccp 664.6, 664.7 & For Interest. Costs, And Fees Pursuant To Ccp 128.5 & Other Applicable Rules -- Motion to enforce settlement agreement granted in the amount of $5,486.05; no attorneys' fees awarded pursuant to contract and no attorneys' fees awarded pursuant to CCP 128.5. Defendant Lawson's request for attorneys' is denied. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. (301/JLW/JT-X) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558

To Enforce Settlement Agreement Pursuant To Ccp 664.6, 664.7 & For Interest, Costs And Fees Pursuant To Ccp 128.5 & Other Applicable Rules
